title: nbx tui --help
stdout_full:
Usage: root tui [OPTIONS]                                                      
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --theme          Theme selector. Use '--theme' to list available themes or   │
│                  '--theme <name>' to launch with one.                        │
│ --help           Show this message and exit.                                 │
